summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of the new Smart Review feature in the Grammar Practice Engine. All 18 tests passed. Smart Review API correctly generates 8 targeted exercises based on weak areas, with proper difficulty progression (easy→medium→hard) and varied exercise types. Quiz submit endpoint correctly returns weak_areas in diagnostic. All existing Grammar Engine endpoints (Learn, Practice, Quiz, Guided, Free) continue to work correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing mastery-module-1 cached data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart Review feature fully tested. POST /api/grammar-engine/mastery-module-1/smart-review with body {weak_areas: ['form', 'usage'], quiz_score: 55} returns 8 exercises with varied types (multiple_choice, gap_fill, error_detection, context_choice, sentence_correction), difficulty progression (easy→medium→hard), and 3 summary tips. Data is cached in grammar_engine_cache collection with cache key 'smart_review_form_usage'. Quiz submit endpoint returns weak_areas in diagnostic when score < 70%.

response_structure.title: Smart Review: The Passive Voice (Present/Past Simple)
response_structure.review_message: Encouraging message about what they'll practice
response_structure.exercises: 8 items with varied types and difficulty progression

smart_review_caching.details: Second call with same weak_areas returns cached data quickly (<5s)
